features.name: covergroup declaration with clocking event
features.description: Code should include a covergroup declaration with a clocking event @(posedge clk)

features.name: coverpoint with expression and illegal_bins
features.description: Code should include a coverpoint with an expression and illegal_bins definition

features.name: wildcard illegal_bins in coverpoint
features.description: Code should include a coverpoint with wildcard illegal_bins using wildcard keyword
features.snippet: coverpoint {a, b, c, d} { wildcard illegal_bins illegal = { 4'b??01 }; }

features.name: covergroup cross with binsof and intersect
features.description: Code should include a cross statement with binsof and intersect operators in illegal_bins
features.snippet: cross cp1, cp2 { wildcard illegal_bins ill = (binsof(cp1) intersect { 2'b1? }) && (binsof(cp2) intersect { 2'b?1 }); }

features.name: covergroup option.per_instance
features.description: Code should include a covergroup with option.per_instance = 1 setting
